---
title: 'Resurrect3D: An Open and Customizable Platform for Visualizing and Analyzing
  Cultural Heritage Artifacts'
author:
- Joshua Romphf
- Elias Neuman-Donihue
- Gregory Heyworth
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- comp_human
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3485444.3487644
code_source: https://github.com/rochester-rcl/resurrect3d
journ: Web3D
year: 2021
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
website: https://resurrect3d.lib.rochester.edu/
pub_number: 51
---
